name: bettervim
description: A native modal-editing state machine for VSCode — not an emulation, not a Neovim bridge. NORMAL-mode keys are discrete keybindings routed to VS Code's own native commands; INSERT mode never touches typing. No shadow undo tree, no `type`-command hijacking — the two root causes behind most VSCodeVim complaints.

commands.title: BetterVim: Delete to end of line (D)
BetterVim: Change to end of line (C)
BetterVim: Open line below / swap selection ends (o)
BetterVim: Append at end of line (A)
BetterVim: Search word under cursor forward (*)
BetterVim: Search word under cursor backward (#)
